case_title: RAMON PEREZ VS. SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL TRANSIT AUTHORITY (MUNI)

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL TRANSIT AUTHORITY (MUNI)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-11-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT REPRESENTED BY JOCELYN PEREZ (SR. LEGAL SECRETARY). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ, RAMON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL TRANSIT AUTHORITY (MUNI) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
